body.title: Nanny Ogg: trigger full test suite nightly via Granny
body.result: Nanny nightly_test_run schedule entry at 02:00; _run_test_suite() with CC-active guard + NIGHTLY_TEST_RESULT channel post; 5 new tests (3e2461bb)
body.description:
Run the full pytest suite nightly at a quiet time (e.g. 2 AM local) when no CC session is active and the machine is idle. Nanny Ogg fires the trigger; Granny owns the subprocess.

Design:
1. Nanny Ogg: add a cron-style schedule entry for NIGHTLY_TEST_RUN at 02:00 local
2. Granny daemon: add handler for NIGHTLY_TEST_RUN message — spawns pytest as a subprocess with a timeout, posts TEST_SUITE_RESULT to shared channel with pass/fail summary
3. Guard: check that no CC session is in_progress before starting (read cc.yaml cc_concurrency_mode / dispatched_cycle.json)
4. Post results to shared channel: NIGHTLY_TEST_RESULT|passed=N|failed=M|skipped=K|duration=Xs

Test command: python3 -m pytest tests/ -q --ignore=tests/e2e --tb=no --timeout=300

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py (add NIGHTLY_TEST_RUN handler), devices/nanny_ogg/ (add schedule entry)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every state change; never run when CC session active
**Scope boundary:** IN — schedule trigger, subprocess run, channel result post. OUT — storing results in DB, test result history, per-test analytics.
**Completion criteria:** At 02:00, if no CC session active, pytest runs to completion and NIGHTLY_TEST_RESULT is posted to shared channel with pass/fail count.
